name: LinkedIn morning adds
prompt: Use browser automation to add 50 connections on LinkedIn. Use human_pace=True. Navigate to /mynetwork/grow, find Connect buttons, add 50 people with relevant backgrounds (AI, tech, devops). Stop after 50 or 45 minutes whichever comes first. Log results to memory.
note: DISABLED — browser_act not tested live yet. Enable after manual test via run_task.py.

name: AI news Facebook post
prompt: Search for recent AI news (model releases, Claude/GPT/hardware/PC). Pick one interesting article published today or yesterday. Open Facebook, post it with a brief 2-sentence commentary. Use human_pace=True. Log what was posted to memory.
